name: Creamy Double Decker Peanut Butter & Chocolat
recipeInstructions:
1 In a 2-cup glass measure with handle, combine peanut butter chips and 2/3 cup sweetened condensed milk. Cook on high power for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, stirring after 1 minute until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth. Stir in 1/2 tsp vanilla.
2 Spread evenly into a foil-lined 8-inch square pan.
3 In another 2-cup glass measure with handle, combine remaining sweetened condensed milk and chocolate chips. Repeat the above procedure.
4 Stir in the remaining 1/2 tsp vanilla.
5 Spread evenly on the peanut butter layer.
6 Chill for 2 hours or until firm.
7 Turn onto a cutting board, peel off foil, and cut into squares.
8 Store covered in the refrigerator.
Microwave ovens vary in wattage and power output. Cooking times may need to be adjusted.
